migration_ctx_t(3) Library Functions Manual migration_ctx_t(3)

NAME

migration_ctx_t - Host migration context for tracking failover state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/discovery/session.h>

Data Fields


migration_state_t state
Current migration state. uint64_t detection_time_ms
When host disconnect detected (Unix ms). uint8_t last_host_id [16]
The host that died. uint32_t disconnect_reason
Reason for disconnect (from HOST_LOST packet).

Detailed Description

Host migration context for tracking failover state.

Definition at line 97 of file src/discovery/session.h.
